name: passed-in-vic
description: Live map + list of residential properties that passed in at auction across Melbourne/VIC, refreshed weekly from REIV with agent price guides.

scripts.build:data: node scripts/scrape-reiv.js --days=30 --min-rows=15 && node scripts/scrape-domain.js --min-rows=30 && node scripts/enrich-prices.js && node scripts/validate-data.js
